title: Getting sick of this Shinji being gay shit
display_title: Getting sick of this Shinji being gay shit
wikitext:
[]: Getting sick of this Shinji being gay shit. Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Oct 13, 2009 2:29 pm i am, for gods sake, we all know what he wanted to do to Asuka. we all saw what he did over her body in end of evangelion. we saw how much he liked falling on Rei. (you can tell while he was staring at his hand in that scene he was thinking, "im never gonna wash this hand again!") so why must we even be having this discussion. two words, fan rape. it happened to gundam wing, and now for the past few years its been happening to evangelion. it really annoys me. anyone else agree?

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Oct 13, 2009 2:30 pm Cool story bro.

[]: Post by Eric Blair » Tue Oct 13, 2009 2:32 pm true story, brah!

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Oct 13, 2009 2:34 pm Eric Blair wrote: true story, brah!

[]: Post by esselfortium » Tue Oct 13, 2009 2:36 pm Seriously though, I don't care what you think. Have you even considered how Shinji must feel about all this?! He's out there tryin' to save the world and puttin' his ass on the line every day and all he gets is these wankers on the sidelines shouting about how he's a gay. Unbelievable! No wonder he killed the whole gaddanged world, thanks to threads like this one.

[]: Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Tue Oct 13, 2009 2:37 pm esselfortium wrote: Cool story bro.

[]: Post by Evangelion__x » Tue Oct 13, 2009 2:38 pm lol. Just.. lol.

[]: Post by Eric Blair » Tue Oct 13, 2009 2:39 pm shinjidoggysasuka wrote: thanks, it just pisses me off. too bas this isn't an 18+ fourum, i have some pics id like to post.

Have you even considered how [i:01b0db0da1]Shinji[/i:01b0db0da1] must feel about all this?! He's out there tryin' to save the world and puttin' his ass on the line every day and all he gets is these wankers on the sidelines shouting about how he's a gay. Unbelievable! No wonder he killed the whole gaddanged world, thanks to threads like this one.[/quote:01b0db0da1] did you even read the post. thats what im saying, we know he is NOT gay. we all know he has a thing for Asuka. im sick of certain fans saying that him and kawru, well, you know. we all know he didn't. we do know he rubbbed off knuckle chirldren over Asuka which i though was sooo funny.
